Params: {3: 'The battle rages on, turning the field into a vast, churning grinder. Walls shatter and crumble under relentless fire. A thick pall of ice dust and gunsmoke hangs in the air, stained a lurid crimson by the shifting aurora.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The howls of Hetero-Creatures, the shriek of metal, and the agonized cries of soldiers fuse into a single, deafening roar, borne on the wind across the frozen wastes.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Palma', 3: 'Damn it, we\'re stuck. Can\'t punch through at all.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'Commandant, the Warlord\'s got me pinned. I can\'t break free.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Palma', 3: 'Commandant! We need to fall back, now!', 4: '1'}
{2: '(Should we really retreat now...?)', 3: '41', 4: '(Look for another way)', 5: '41'}
{3: 'To reassess the situation, you turn your attention back to the battlefield.'}
{3: 'Underground factory lines have reactivated. Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures swarm from the tunnels, forming fresh waves for the legion. But on your side...'}
{3: 'Everyone is at their limit; once-high morale is bleeding away with each protracted minute of the slaughter.'}
{3: 'Then, across this landscape of pain and despair, a silver blade flashes. Its light cuts through the crimson haze—and through your thoughts.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Victory is still possible! If we retreat now... this land will fall to the Frostheart Emperor!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'And we\'re not fighting alone. Countless soldiers have joined this battle. If we pull back now, their sacrifices will mean nothing!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Palma', 3: 'Pretty words don\'t win fights. We\'re trapped. So\'s Derek. You got a magic trick to get the whale to its position?', 4: '1'}

{3: 'Rosetta raises her light sword and charges back into the horde. With every flash of her blade, another Hetero-Creature falls. Over the communicator, her voice is calm, with the serene steadiness of someone who has survived a hundred battles.'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'There\'s still one chance to turn the tide, Commandant. In this land, there exists a force even the Ascendants fear!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Diana promised she\'d return. She never breaks her word!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'So until then, my duty is to make all necessary preparations.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'As the Hetero-Creatures target the exposed Rosetta, she does not evade. Instead, she drives her light sword to its limit, and the blade erupts with blinding radiance.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Palma', 3: 'Do you hear yourself? If this goes on, everyone will—', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I know! Pull the wounded back now! Anyone who\'s unsure should retreat too!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'You as well, Commandant... This area is getting more dangerous by the minute. You\'re vital to this battle. Evacuate to safety with the others.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'That would reduce our M.I.N.D. connection efficiency.', 3: '155', 4: 'I\'m not falling back.', 5: '164'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Commandant, you can retreat to the maximum effective range and observe. After that... we adapt.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Besides, even if our M.I.N.D. connection breaks, this frame won\'t shut down immediately. I think... it should hold.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Rosetta is telling you to leave her if the situation turns. For her, this is a final stand.'}
{2: 'I\'m not leaving you alone.', 3: '164', 4: 'I\'m staying here.', 5: '164'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alliance Soldier', 3: 'Fine, let\'s do this! We\'ve come this ******* far anyway!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Palma', 3: 'This better really be the last time! I\'ll handle the wounded!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'As they watch Rosetta weaving through Hetero-Creatures and bombarding explosions, everyone—Palma included—seems to draw something from it. A faint hope, yet absolutely vital.'}
{3: 'At this point, there is no turning back. Retreat now, and the Arctic Route Union will pay a far steeper price later.'}
{3: 'However cruel, this is the daily reality of life on Earth.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mina', 3: 'Dr. Bear, push all of Derek\'s engines to max output!', 4: '11'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Dr. Bear', 3: 'Those engines will blow if we push them! We won\'t have a way back!', 4: '11'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mina', 3: 'If we don\'t survive this, there won\'t be a "back"! Push them to the breaking point!', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Mina\'s voice crackles through the comms next. She is regrouping the bionic whale pod for another assault.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rumyantsev', 3: 'Listen up, blonde boy! Your opponent is me, Frostheart Warlord Rumyantsev!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noan', 3: 'By the way... Simon, you seem to be throwing up less this time?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Simon', 3: 'Uh... I\'ll throw up after we win. That\'s the plan.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'This is the final stand. Outnumbered and outgunned, everyone is fighting with the desperate, unwavering resolve of those who have nothing left to lose.'}
{2: 'Once you\'ve successfully broken through, anyone, support the whale pod immediately!', 3: '233'}
{3: 'It is never an order, only a desperate hope. And so you keep fighting, shouting into your terminal, praying for a miracle to descend upon the battlefield, until—'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The perseverance finally turns the tide of battle. The relentless battle yields its reward:'}
{1: 'The moment of "luck" has finally arrived as hoped.', 3: '50', 4: 'ffffffff'}
{3: 'The moment of "luck" has finally arrived as hoped.'}
